title: Alseodaphne amara
taxonomy: Alseodaphne amara is classified in the family Lauraceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the laurel family. This family is part of the order Laurales, which consists of a diverse group of flowering plants. The Lauraceae family is native to the tropics and subtropics, with species found in various parts of the world, including Asia and the Americas. Alseodaphne amara is an evergreen tree or shrub native to tropical Africa. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Lauraceae family.
